data.description:
Goal:
Make stale grooming first-class in dispatch settings and external APIs. Add a stale grooming action/pool target, default resolver, supported configured-model selection data, and API routes for stale listing, selected enqueue, oldest-N enqueue, and status.

Verification:
1. Route tests cover default resolution, override selection, list stale beats, enqueue selected targets, enqueue oldest five, and status payloads.
2. `bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/stale-beat-grooming*.test.ts` passes.

Constraints:
Do not silently fall back to the first configured agent. Preserve loud failure markers for missing configured dispatch resources.
